cdec_cbr_latest_query_summary.sample_window_note: Parsed from the CDEC QueryF latest page on 2026-07-06; use as source-selection evidence only until a formal CSV/JSON pull, QA flags, terms review, and guide validation are attached.

candidate_stations.role: primary modern South Fork flow/stage candidate for Chili Bar reach visual-band review
secondary powerhouse/operator discharge context; use to interpret release timing, not as the sole river-stage source

cdec_station_search.provider: California Data Exchange Center / California Department of Water Resources

promotion_gate: CBR is the current primary official modern-flow candidate, and the first CDEC terms/flag/station relation review plus a 30-day CBR/A25 context window are attached. South Fork visual/gameplay flow bands remain blocked until broader windows, A25 X-flag interpretation, release context, legal/redistribution signoff, hydrologic station-to-reach review, and guide validation are attached.
purpose: Select a modern official flow/stage source candidate after USGS 11445500 returned no P30D instantaneous discharge or gage-height time series.
required_before_flow_band_promotion: Treat the attached CDEC terms/flags/station relation review as engineering provenance only until legal/redistribution signoff is complete.
Resolve or document the observed A25 X flag against CDEC/station metadata before using A25 daily discharge for release interpretation.
Expand reproducible CBR/A25 pulls across representative seasonal, low, commercial, high, too-low, and washout windows with timestamps, units, sensor numbers, and QA/flag meanings.
Compare CBR flow/stage to existing low/median/high presets and guide/outfitter notes for the Chili Bar to Coloma section.
Use A25 powerhouse data only as release-operation context unless hydrologic routing and guide review confirm direct relation to raftable flow at the target reach.
Record how selected flow bands alter holes, exposed rocks, wave trains, wet banks, boulder push/damping, and rescue visibility before Unreal promotion.

terms_flags_station_relation_review.review_summary: CDEC flag definitions and DWR Conditions of Use are recorded for import provenance; the 30-day A25 context introduced an X flag that is held/excluded pending CDEC or station metadata definition. CBR remains review-gated for broader windows, release context, station-to-reach routing, legal/redistribution signoff, and guide validation.

usgs_screening.inactive_or_no_current_series_site: USGS 11445500 SF AMERICAN R NR LOTUS CA

nearby_active_iv_result.note: Active IV discharge station found in the broad American River bounding box, but it is North Fork context and not the South Fork Chili Bar corridor.
nearby_active_iv_result.station_name: NF AMERICAN R A NORTH FORK DAM CA
